toolCalls.name: ask_user

questions.question: What should the file be named and where should it be created?

toolCalls.description: Ask the user one or more questions to gather preferences, clarify requirements, or make decisions.

messages.content: I'll create a basic HTML skeleton in `test.html`.

toolCalls.name: write_file

args.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Document</title>
</head>
<body>
    
</body>
</html>

toolCalls.description:
Writes content to a specified file in the local filesystem.

      The user has the ability to modify `content`. If modified, this will be stated in the response.

messages.content: The file `test.html` has been created in the root directory with a basic HTML5 skeleton.
